/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/cpp_sem1.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/cpp_sem1.dir/src/test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_sem1.dir/lib/gui_engine/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_sem1.dir/lib/gui_engine/css_parser.cppm.o -o cpp_sem1   -L/home/artem/cpp_sem1/build/_deps/fltk-build/src/../lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/artem/cpp_sem1/build/_deps/fltk-build/src/../lib _deps/fltk-build/lib/libfltk.a _deps/fltk-build/lib/libfltk_images.a _deps/fltk-build/lib/libfltk_z.a src/frontend/libfrontend.a src/backend/libbackend.a lib/graph_lib/libgraph_lib.a _deps/fltk-build/lib/libfltk_images.a _deps/fltk-build/lib/libfltk.a /usr/lib64/libdl.a /usr/lib64/libX11.so _deps/fltk-build/lib/libfltk_png.a _deps/fltk-build/lib/libfltk_jpeg.a _deps/fltk-build/lib/libfltk_z.a
